system.description: You have learned the weakness of Sherazade's Shadows—those OL 5, 1 Wound copies of past enemies with Shadow Body Gifts. Shadows can appear and disappear from darkness (+1 OL in shadows), regenerate unless in full light, and are only permanently destroyed by direct sunlight. With this Gift: (1) You can force Shadows to manifest by creating bright light (lanterns, magic, fire)—they cannot use Shadow Body while you illuminate them. (2) Once per Scene, make an opposed Check vs a Shadow's OL 5: on success, you've maneuvered it into a sunbeam, moonbeam through window, or reflected light—Shadow is destroyed permanently without Wound roll. (3) You recognize which past enemy a Shadow is copying, giving you +1 to Checks against it based on previous knowledge of its tactics.
system.requirements: Survive at least one encounter with Sherazade's Shadows and study their mechanics, OR research shadow-creature lore
system.limitations: Requires light source to be effective—useless in total darkness. Creating bright light may alert other enemies. Sunlight destruction only works if you can create/find actual sunlight (challenging indoors or at night). Some locations Sherazade chooses for confrontations have no windows or light sources—plan accordingly.
